name: Incident clustering eval fixture
description: Five multi-ticket incidents plus unrelated singleton tickets for evaluating incident clustering with pairwise precision/recall.

tickets.subject: How do I export Warp settings?
tickets.body: Where do I export my keyboard shortcuts and theme settings so I can move them to a new laptop?

tickets.subject: Shared command library stale
tickets.body: My shared command library is stale. I can see the latest entries on another machine, but this Mac keeps showing last week's Warp Drive contents.

tickets.subject: Cannot open terminal after update
tickets.body: Warp will not stay open after the update. The dock icon bounces, a window flashes, then the app quits without an error dialog.

tickets.subject: GitHub connect button loops after authorization
tickets.body: The GitHub connect flow is looping. I see the authorize page, grant access, then land back at the start. No error message, just a loop.

tickets.subject: Warp Drive commands stopped syncing on macOS
tickets.body: After updating Warp this morning, my shared Warp Drive commands no longer sync. The sidebar spinner never finishes and teammates can see commands that I cannot.

tickets.subject: Webhook delivery lag for Slack channel
tickets.body: Slack notifications from Warp are lagging badly. The webhook test succeeds but real alerts arrive much later than expected.

tickets.subject: SCIM provisioning failing with forbidden error
tickets.body: Our SCIM sync shows successful pushes in Okta, but Warp rejects the users as forbidden. Existing SSO users can still log in.

tickets.subject: Drive sync spinner stuck forever
tickets.body: Warp Drive has been stuck syncing for over an hour on my MacBook. New notebooks and workflows from the team do not appear locally.

tickets.subject: OAuth callback from GitHub not sticking
tickets.body: Several developers in our workspace cannot link GitHub today. The OAuth callback appears to succeed but Warp never records the connection.

tickets.subject: Incident alerts duplicated in Slack
tickets.body: We received three copies of the same Warp incident alert in our #ops channel. This started today and only affects the Slack webhook.

tickets.subject: Need copy of renewal contract
tickets.body: Can you send us a copy of the signed renewal contract for our procurement archive?

tickets.subject: SSO login blocked for newly assigned users
tickets.body: People newly assigned to the Warp app in Okta hit a 403 page after SAML login. Removing and re-adding the assignment did not help.

tickets.subject: Warp crashes immediately on launch
tickets.body: After installing the latest Warp update, the app opens a blank terminal window and crashes within two seconds. macOS crash report mentions the renderer.

tickets.subject: Delete my personal data
tickets.body: I want to permanently delete my Warp account and all personal data associated with my email address under GDPR.

tickets.subject: Terminal window disappears right away
tickets.body: The terminal window appears and disappears immediately every time I launch Warp. Reinstalling did not fix it.

tickets.subject: Feature request: offline AI history
tickets.body: I would like Warp AI history to be available offline when I am traveling. This is not blocking us, just a product suggestion.

tickets.subject: Crash report references GPU process
tickets.body: My Warp client crashes at startup. The Apple crash report includes GPU process and renderer initialization frames.

tickets.subject: Slack alert arrived 40 minutes late
tickets.body: Our Warp alert webhook to Slack is delayed today. The incident notification eventually posted but it was around 40 minutes after the event.

tickets.subject: Cannot finish GitHub integration setup
tickets.body: Our team is trying to enable the GitHub integration. After approving the OAuth app, the callback returns to Warp but the integration still says not connected.

tickets.subject: Okta SCIM users not created in workspace
tickets.body: Okta says SCIM provisioning completed, but the users are not present in the Warp workspace and receive access denied on login.

tickets.subject: Need VAT added to March invoice
tickets.body: Please reissue our March invoice with our company VAT number and billing address. This is only for our finance records.

tickets.subject: Duplicate Slack messages from the Warp webhook
tickets.body: Every automation alert from Warp is posting twice in Slack. The duplicated messages have the same payload and timestamp range.

tickets.subject: Team snippets missing after latest update
tickets.body: Since the latest macOS client update, team snippets are missing from Warp Drive. Restarting the app and signing out did not refresh them.

tickets.subject: GitHub OAuth keeps sending me back to login
tickets.body: When I click Connect GitHub from Warp Drive, the GitHub authorization page appears, I approve it, and then Warp drops me back on the same login screen. I have tried Chrome and Safari.

tickets.subject: New Okta users cannot access Warp
tickets.body: We provisioned three new engineers through Okta SCIM but Warp returns a 403 when they try to sign in through SSO.

expected_clusters.summary: GitHub OAuth authorization redirects users back to the login screen instead of completing account linking.
Warp Drive sync stalls on macOS after update, leaving shared commands missing or outdated.
Slack webhook notifications for Warp alerts are delayed or delivered multiple times.
SSO/SCIM provisioning through Okta fails with 403, preventing new team members from accessing Warp.
Warp terminal crashes on launch after an update, likely tied to GPU renderer initialization.
Customer requests a VAT-corrected invoice reissue.
Customer requests an offline AI history feature.
Customer asks to delete personal data under GDPR.
Customer asks how to export local Warp settings.
Customer asks for a copy of a renewal contract.

evaluation_notes.primary_metric: pairwise clustering precision/recall/F1 over ticket_id pairs
evaluation_notes.negative_pairs: tickets with different expected_incident_id values, including singleton tickets
evaluation_notes.singleton_policy: singleton tickets should remain alone unless a future fixture intentionally links them to an incident
